def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd; import numpy as np; import ta
    short_ma = df['close'].rolling(window=params['short_window']).mean()
    long_ma = df['close'].rolling(window=params['long_window']).mean()
    rsi = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=params['rsi_window'])
    signals = pd.Series(np.where((short_ma > long_ma) & (rsi > params['rsi_threshold']), 1, np.where((short_ma < long_ma) & (rsi < (100 - params['rsi_threshold'])), -1, 0)), index=df.index)
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: GBP/USD exhibits momentum continuation when short-term moving average crosses above long-term moving average, confirmed by RSI indicating overbought conditions.
